hero.description: Step into the world of global trading with access to CFDs on leading asset classes. Enjoy 0% commission trading, fast execution, and an intuitive interface designed for every level of trader.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChooseUs.description: From entry-level traders to seasoned experienced traders, our platform delivers the flexibility and power you need. Access hundreds of CFD instruments with conditions designed to maximize your trading experience.

experienced.bullet3: Analyze charts and monitor market trends

tradeOnYourTerms.title: Trade on Your Terms
tradeOnYourTerms.description: Our next-generation platform gives you full control across desktop, tablet, and mobile. Experience real-time market connectivity, rapid order execution, and advanced tools that keep you one step ahead.

cryptoPage.title: Cryptocurrencies
cryptoPage.paragraph1: Cryptocurrencies have become a key component of today's trading environment, offering a decentralized and technology-driven alternative to traditional assets. Built on blockchain networks, digital currencies provide transparency and security while creating new avenues for global participation. Their volatility and continuous development make them a distinct asset class for traders seeking diversification and exposure to fast-moving markets.
cryptoPage.paragraph2: With crypto CFDs, traders can speculate on price movements without directly holding digital coins. This allows flexibility to trade in both rising and falling conditions while using advanced tools to manage risk. From well-known assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum to emerging altcoins, our platform delivers access to a market that operates without interruption, 24 hours a day.

wideCoverage.title: Wide Asset Coverage
wideCoverage.description: Access major and alternative cryptocurrencies in one place.

alwaysOpen.title: 24/7 Availability
alwaysOpen.description: Engage in markets that remain open around the clock.

versatile.title: Versatile Trading
versatile.description: Trade long or short with the flexibility of CFDs.

cryptoPage.tagline: Innovation in Motion. Markets Without Borders.

currenciesPage.title: Currencies
currenciesPage.paragraph1: Currencies remain the foundation of international trade and finance, serving as the official units of value across global economies. Their prices fluctuate daily, influenced by supply and demand, interest rate decisions, inflation, and geopolitical developments. The foreign exchange (forex) market is the world's largest financial marketplace, operating five days a week with unmatched liquidity and trading volume.
currenciesPage.paragraph2: Forex trading often takes place through Contracts for Difference (CFDs), allowing traders to speculate on price movements without owning the underlying currencies. Trading is conducted in pairs, reflecting the strength of one currency relative to another. Well-known majors like EUR/USD and GBP/USD dominate market activity, while minor and exotic pairs provide additional opportunities for diversification. With constant price movements and round-the-clock access, currencies and CFD trading remain at the core of global financial markets.

pairs.title: 40+ Currency Pairs
pairs.description: Access a wide range of major, minor, and exotic pairs.

liquidity.title: Liquidity & Speed
liquidity.description: Trade in the world's most liquid market.

global.title: Global Opportunities
global.description: React to shifting economic and political events worldwide.

flexible.title: Flexible Strategies
flexible.description: Speculate on both rising and falling exchange rates.

currenciesPage.tagline: Innovation in Motion. Markets Without Borders.

stocksPage.title: Stocks
stocksPage.paragraph1: Stocks provide direct exposure to the performance of leading companies across industries and regions. Trading stock CFDs allows participants to engage with some of the world's most recognized businesses, from technology innovators to financial institutions. Driven by corporate earnings, sector growth, and macroeconomic factors, stock markets offer traders diverse opportunities to react to both long-term trends and short-term market movements. With flexible access and efficient execution, stocks remain a central choice for portfolio diversification.

stockCfds.title: 200+ Stock CFDs
stockCfds.description: Trade shares of companies across multiple global exchanges.

leaders.title: Leaders in Every Sector
leaders.description: Access technology, finance, energy, and more.

flexible.title: Flexible Trading
flexible.description: Speculate on price changes without direct ownership.

insights.title: Market Insights
insights.description: React to earnings releases and breaking news.

stocksPage.tagline: Innovation in Motion. Markets Without Borders.

commoditiesPage.title: Commodities
commoditiesPage.introHeading: Commodities as the Building Blocks of Global Markets
commoditiesPage.paragraph1: Commodities have always been central to trade, representing the raw materials that power industries and support economic growth. Energy, metals, and agricultural products influence not only global supply chains but also financial markets, where shifts in production and demand drive constant price changes.
commoditiesPage.paragraph2: For traders, commodities are often accessed through Contracts for Difference (CFDs), which make it possible to speculate on price movements without taking physical delivery of the underlying assets. This allows participation in markets ranging from the safe-haven appeal of gold and silver to the volatility of crude oil and natural gas. Commodities traded via CFDs remain a diverse and dynamic market, offering both defensive positions and speculative opportunities tied to real-world economic forces.

metals.title: Metals with Enduring Value
metals.description: Gold, silver, platinum, and palladium used for both investment and industry.

energy.title: Energy as a Market Driver
energy.description: Crude oil, Brent, and natural gas reflecting global demand and supply.

agriculture.title: Agricultural Influence
agriculture.description: Coffee, wheat, sugar, and other staples shaped by seasonality and consumption.

industrial.title: Industrial Inputs
industrial.description: Copper, aluminum, and nickel essential for infrastructure and manufacturing.

commoditiesPage.tagline: Innovation in Motion. Markets Without Borders.

indicesPage.title: Indices
indicesPage.introHeading: Indices as Benchmarks of Global Markets
indicesPage.paragraph1: Stock indices are among the most widely followed measures of economic performance, representing groups of leading companies within a region or sector. By trading indices, participants gain exposure to broader market movements rather than focusing on individual stocks.
indicesPage.paragraph2: Well-known benchmarks such as the S&P 500, Dow Jones, and NASDAQ 100 reflect developments in the United States, while the DAX 40, FTSE 100, and Nikkei 225 provide insight into European and Asian economies. Index CFDs allow traders to respond efficiently to global economic shifts, corporate earnings, and geopolitical events, offering a practical way to follow the pulse of international markets.

globalBenchmarks.title: Global Benchmarks
globalBenchmarks.description: Access leading indices including S&P 500, NASDAQ 100, and DAX 40.

broadMarketExposure.title: Broad Market Exposure
broadMarketExposure.description: Trade trends that capture the movement of entire economies.

regionalCoverage.title: Regional Coverage
regionalCoverage.description: Engage with indices from Europe, Asia, and beyond.

flexibleTradingApproach.title: Flexible Trading Approach
flexibleTradingApproach.description: Speculate on overall market direction through CFDs.

indicesPage.tagline: Innovation in Motion. Markets Without Borders.

cfdsPage.title: CFDs
cfdsPage.paragraph1: CFDs have become a central instrument in modern trading, valued for their adaptability and market reach. Rather than buying and holding assets, traders speculate on price differences, creating opportunities in fast-moving markets without the requirement of ownership. This makes CFDs an efficient way to diversify strategies and react to market shifts.
cfdsPage.paragraph2: With CFDs, traders can access global stocks, indices, commodities, cryptos and currencies within a single account. The ability to go long or short provides flexibility across different conditions, while leverage magnifies both potential returns and risks. As such, CFDs are best approached with structured strategies and consistent risk management, balancing opportunity with responsibility.

bullets.one: Engage with global markets through one account
bullets.two: Trade long or short depending on market conditions
bullets.three: Access a wide range of instruments across asset classes
bullets.four: Manage risk effectively to maintain trading discipline

footer.companyInfoBody: This website 'Colbari' is operated by Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd, a South African investment firm, authorized and regulated by the Financial Sector Conduct Authority of South Africa with Financial Service Provider (FSP) license number 51822 to provide intermediary service. Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd is registered in South Africa, with registration number 2021/547363/07. Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd registered office is located at 1 Edgemere Road Elfindale, Cape Town, 7945, South Africa. Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd owns and operates the "Colbari" brand.
footer.valorValueBridge: Valor (PTY) Limited and Value Bridge Single Member Investment Services S.A have a common shareholder. Value Bridge Single Member Investment Services S.A, registered at 43 Aiolou str., 3rd floor, 10551, Athens, Greece, is regulated by the Hellenic Capital Market Commission with license number 6/927/31-8-2021.
footer.dunfield: Dunfield Ltd with register address at Office No. 45, 9.17 Capital Tower, 91 Waterloo Road, London, United Kingdom SE1 8RT is the paying agent of Valor Capital Ltd.
footer.riskWarningBody: Contracts for difference ('CFDs') is a complex financial product, with speculative character, the trading of which involves significant risks of loss of capital. Trading CFDs, which is a marginal product, may result in the loss of your entire balance. Remember that leverage in CFDs can work both to your advantage and disadvantage. CFDs traders do not own, or have any rights to, the underlying assets. Trading CFDs is not appropriate for all investors. Past performance does not constitute a reliable indicator of future results. Future forecasts do not constitute a reliable indicator of future performance. Before deciding to trade, you should carefully consider your investment objectives, level of experience and risk tolerance. You should not deposit more than you are prepared to lose. Please ensure you fully understand the risk associated with the product envisaged and seek independent advice, if necessary.
footer.antiSpam: Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd applies strict measures in line with anti-spam regulations by avoiding unsolicited advertising.
footer.regionalRestrictionsBody: Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd does not offer services within the European Economic Area as well as in certain other jurisdictions such as the USA, British Columbia, Canada, Iran, North Korea, Myanmar, Russia and some other regions.
footer.adviserNotice: Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd does not issue advice, recommendations or opinions in relation to acquiring, holding or disposing of any financial product. Valor Capital (PTY) Ltd is not a financial adviser.
footer.riskWarningShortBody: Trading in CFDs carry a high level of risk to your capital due to the volatility of the underlying market. These products may not be suitable for all investors. Therefore, you should ensure that you understand the risks and seek advice from an independent and suitably licensed financial advisor.
